---
title: "OTC-like drugs"
output: html_document
date: "2026-05-30"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## R Markdown

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(readxl)
library(openxlsx)

library(stringi)
library(ggh4x)

library(cowplot)
library(patchwork)
library(ggtext)
library(ggrepel)

library(rkt)
library(ggh4x)
```

```{r}
options(knitr.df_print = rmarkdown::paged_table)
```


```{r}
# make df folder

dir.create("../df/format", showWarnings = TRUE, recursive = FALSE, mode = "0777")
```

```{r}
# make df folder

dir.create("../df/format/dem", showWarnings = TRUE, recursive = FALSE, mode = "0777")

dir.create("../df/format/prf", showWarnings = TRUE, recursive = FALSE, mode = "0777")
```

```{r}
file_dem <- list.files("../df/filter/dem") %>% str_remove("\\.RDS")

file_dem

path_dem <- paste0("../df/filter/dem/", file_dem , ".RDS")
```

```{r}
file_prf <- list.files("../df/filter/prf") %>% str_remove("\\.RDS")

file_prf

path_prf <- paste0("../df/filter/prf/", file_prf , ".RDS")
```

```{r}
file_all <- c(file_dem, file_prf)

path_all <- c(path_dem, path_prf)
```

```{r}
df_1 <- readRDS(path_all[1])
```


```{r}
list_df <- purrr::map(path_dem, function(x){
  
  df <- readRDS(x) %>%
    pivot_longer(cols = c(starts_with("M_"), starts_with("F_")),
              names_to = "SEX_AGE",
              values_to = "VALUE")

  df <- df  %>%
    mutate(SEX = str_extract(SEX_AGE, "^M|^F")) %>%
    mutate(AGE = str_remove(SEX_AGE, "^M_|^F_"))
  
  df <- df  %>%
    mutate(SEX = case_when(SEX == "M" ~ "Male",
                         SEX == "F" ~ "Female")) %>%
    mutate(SEX = factor(SEX, levels = c("Male", "Female")))
  
  levels_age <- df %>% distinct(AGE) %>%
    mutate(AGE = str_replace_all(AGE, "_", "–")) %>%
    pull(AGE)
  
  df <- df  %>%
      mutate(AGE = str_replace(AGE, "_", "–")) %>%
    mutate(AGE = fct_other(AGE,
                         keep = as.character(levels_age[1:18]),
                         other_level = "90–"))
  
  
#   df <- df %>% 
#  mutate(AGE = str_replace(AGE, "_", "–")) %>%
#  mutate(AGE = factor(AGE, levels = levels_age))
  
  df <- df %>%
    mutate(across(c(TOTAL, VALUE), ~ str_replace(.x, "-", "0"))) %>%
    mutate(across(c(TOTAL, VALUE), ~ as.numeric(.x))) %>%
    mutate(across(c(TOTAL, VALUE), ~ replace_na(.x, 0)))
  
  return(df)
  
})
```


```{r}
for (i in 1:length(file_dem)){
  assign(file_dem[i], list_df[[i]])
}
```

```{r}
df_otc_dem <- df_oral_dem %>%
  bind_rows(df_ext_dem)
```

```{r}
df_otc_dem %>%
  distinct(AGE) %>% pull(AGE)
```


```{r}
df_otc_dem <- df_otc_dem %>%
  mutate(AGE_ori = AGE) %>%
  mutate(AGE = fct_recode(AGE,
                          "0–4" = "0–4",
                          "5–9" = "5–9",
                          "10–14" = "10–14",
                          "15–19" ="15–19",
                          "20–69" = "20–24",
                          "20–69" = "25–29",
                          "20–69" = "30–34",
                          "20–69" = "35–39",
                          "20–69" = "40–44",
                          "20–69" = "45–49",
                          "20–69" = "50–54",
                          "20–69" = "55–59",
                          "20–69" = "60–64",
                          "20–69" = "65–69", 
                          "70–74" = "70–74", 
                          "75–" = "75–79",
                          "75–" = "80–84",
                          "75–" = "85–89",
                          "75–" = "90–"))
```




```{r}
levels_age_new <- df_otc_dem %>%
  distinct(AGE) %>% pull(AGE) %>% as.character()

levels_age_new
```
```{r}
df_otc_dem <- df_otc_dem %>%
  mutate(AGE = factor(AGE, levels = levels_age_new))
```


# dem


```{r}
df_pop_dem <- readRDS("../rds/pop/dem/df_pop_dem")
```

```{r}
df_pop_dem_long <- df_pop_dem %>%
  filter(AGE != "total") %>%
  select(YEAR, AGE, ALL_total, ALL_m, ALL_f) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = starts_with("ALL_"),
               names_to = "SEX",
               values_to = "POP")
```

```{r}
df_pop_dem_long <- df_pop_dem_long %>%
  mutate(SEX= str_remove(SEX, "ALL_")) %>%
  mutate(SEX = case_when(SEX == "total" ~ "All",
                         SEX == "m" ~ "Male",
                         SEX == "f" ~ "Female")) 
```

```{r}
df_pop_dem_cat <- df_pop_dem_long %>%
  mutate(AGE_ori = AGE) %>%
  mutate(AGE = str_remove(AGE, "_$")) %>%
  mutate(AGE = as.numeric(AGE)) %>%
  mutate(AGE = case_when(AGE %in% 0:4 ~ "0–4",
                         AGE %in% 5:9 ~ "5–9",
                         AGE %in% 10:14 ~ "10–14",
                         AGE %in% 15:19 ~ "15–19",
                         AGE %in% 20:69 ~ "20–69",
                         AGE %in% 70:74 ~ "70–74",
                         AGE >= 75 ~ "75–",
                         .default = NA
                         ))

# 0–14  15–19 20–69 70–74 75–  

```

#

```{r}
get_exp <- function(x){

  if (x > 0.001){
    
    return("")
  }
  
  else {
  
    p <- formatC(x, digits = 1, format = "e", flag = "#")
    
    ex <- p %>% str_extract("(?<=e).+") %>%
      str_remove_all("(?<=\\-)0+") %>%
      str_replace("-", "−")
    
    return(ex)
  }
}

get_expv <- Vectorize(get_exp)
```

```{r}
get_num <- function(x){

    if (x > 0.001){
    
      p <- formatC(x, digits = 2, format = "fg", flag = "#")
      
      return(p)
  }
  
  else {
  
    p <- formatC(x, digits = 1, format = "e", flag = "#")
    
    num <- p %>% str_extract(".+(?=e)")
    
    num <- str_c(num, "×10")
      
    return(num)
  }
}

get_numv <- Vectorize(get_num)
```

```{r}
df_pop_dem_sa <- df_pop_dem_cat %>%
  group_by(YEAR, AGE, SEX) %>%
  summarise(POP = sum(POP)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(ID = paste0(YEAR, "_", SEX, "_", AGE))

df_pop_dem_sa
```


# start analysis


```{r}
# Ｌ－カルボシステイン

df_otc_dem <- df_otc_dem %>%
  mutate(ING = str_remove(ING, "Ｌ－"))
```



```{r}
df_otc_dem <- df_otc_dem %>%
  filter(SHEET != "inpt")
```


```{r}
df_dem_total <- df_otc_dem %>%
  distinct(DRUG_name, YEAR, SHEET, ING, .keep_all = TRUE) %>%
  group_by(YEAR, TYPE, ING) %>%
    summarise(SUM = sum(VALUE * COST_per)) %>%
  mutate(ID = paste0(YEAR, "_", ING, "_", TYPE))
```



```{r}
df_dem_value <- df_otc_dem %>%
  group_by(YEAR, TYPE) %>%
  summarise(SUM = sum(VALUE * COST_per)) %>%
  mutate(ID = paste0(YEAR, "_", "_", TYPE))
```

# top oral drug
# overall

```{r}
df_otc_dem %>%
  group_by(YEAR, SEX, AGE) %>%
  summarise(SUM = sum(VALUE * COST_per)/10^9) %>%
  bind_rows(df_otc_dem %>%
              group_by(YEAR, AGE) %>%
              summarise(SUM = sum(VALUE * COST_per)/10^9) %>%
              mutate(SEX = "All")) %>%
  mutate(SEX = factor(SEX, levels = c("All", "Male", "Female"))) %>%
  
  mutate(YEAR = as.factor(YEAR)) %>%
  ggplot(aes( YEAR, SUM, group = SEX, colour = SEX )) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.3)+
  scale_color_manual(values = c("black", "#1f77b4", "#d62728"))+
  facet_wrap2(vars(AGE), nrow = 1)+
  theme_classic()
```



```{r}
# raw cost

df_otc_raw <- df_otc_dem %>%
  group_by(YEAR, SEX, AGE) %>%
  summarise(SUM = sum(VALUE * COST_per)/10^9) %>%
  bind_rows(df_otc_dem %>%
              group_by(YEAR, AGE) %>%
              summarise(SUM = sum(VALUE * COST_per)/10^9) %>%
              mutate(SEX = "All")) %>%
  mutate(SEX = factor(SEX, levels = c("All", "Male", "Female"))) %>%
  mutate(CAT = "sum")
```


```{r}
# adjust and convert to million

df_otc_adj <- df_otc_raw %>%
  mutate(ID = paste0(YEAR, "_", SEX,  "_", AGE)) %>%
  left_join(df_pop_dem_sa %>% select(ID, POP),
            by = join_by(ID)) %>%
  mutate(SUM = SUM * 10^9/(POP * 10^3)) %>%
  mutate(CAT = "adj")
```

```{r}
df_otc_ra <- df_otc_raw %>%
  bind_rows(df_otc_adj) %>%
  mutate(CAT = factor(CAT, levels = c("sum", "adj")))

df_otc_ra 
```

```{r}
#
labeller_otc_ra <- c("sum" = "Cost (×10<sup>9</sup> JPY)",
                     "adj"= "Cost (JPY/person)")
```

```{r}
list_scale_y <- list(
  CAT == "sum" ~ scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 150),
                                    breaks = seq(0, 150, 50),
                                    labels = scales::label_comma()),
  
  CAT == "adj" ~ scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 6000),
                                    breaks = seq(0, 6000, 1000),
                                    labels = scales::label_comma())
)
```



```{r}
p1 <- df_otc_ra %>%
    ggplot(aes( YEAR, SUM, group = SEX, colour = SEX )) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.3)+
  scale_color_manual(values = c("black", "#1f77b4", "#d62728"))+
  facet_grid2(rows = vars(CAT),
              cols = vars(AGE),
              labeller = labeller(CAT = labeller_otc_ra),
              switch = "y",
              scales = "free_y",
              axes = "all",
              remove_labels = "all")+
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(2014, 2023),
                     breaks = seq(2014, 2022, 4),
                     labels = c("2014", "2018",  "2022"))+
  ggh4x::facetted_pos_scales(y = list_scale_y)+
  guides(colour = guide_legend(override.aes = list(linewidth = 0.5) ) )+
  labs(tag = "A",
       x = "Year", y = "Cost")+
  theme_classic()+
  theme(plot.tag = element_text(size = 12, colour = "black", face = "bold"),
        plot.title = element_text(size = 8, colour = "black", face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
        strip.placement = "outside",
        strip.background = element_blank(),
        strip.text.x = element_text(size = 8, colour = "black", face = "bold",
                                    margin = margin(0, 0, 1, 0, unit = "mm")),
        strip.text.y.left = element_markdown(size = 8, colour ="black", face ="bold",
                                             margin = margin(0, 0, 0, 0, "pt")),
        
          axis.title.x = element_markdown(size = 8, colour = "black", face = "bold"),
        axis.title.y = element_blank(),
                  axis.text.x = element_text(size = 8, colour = "black"),
          axis.text.y = element_text(size = 8, colour = "black"),
          axis.line = element_line(linewidth = 0.3, colour = "black"),
          axis.ticks = element_line(linewidth = 0.3, colour = "black"),
                  legend.title =element_blank(),
          legend.text = element_text(size = 8, colour = "black"),
        legend.key.height = unit(5, "mm"),
        legend.key.spacing.y = unit(0, "mm"),
        legend.key = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "inside",
        legend.justification.inside = c(0, 1),
        legend.background = element_blank(),
        legend.position.inside = c(0.01, 1),
        panel.spacing = unit(3, "mm"),
        legend.margin = margin(0, 0, 0, 0, "mm"),
        legend.box.margin = margin(0, 0, 0, 0, "mm"),
        legend.box.background = element_blank(),
          plot.margin = margin(0, 0, 0, 0, "mm"))

p1
```

# rkt

```{r}
rkt_otc_ra <- df_otc_ra %>%
  nest(data = - c(SEX, AGE, CAT)) %>%
 mutate(
    model = purrr::map(data, ~ rkt(date = .x$YEAR,
                                 y = .x$SUM)),
    tau = map_dbl(model, "tau"),
    p_value = map_dbl(model, "sl"),
    slope = map_dbl(model, "B")
  )

rkt_otc_ra 
```


```{r}
get_exp <- function(x){

  if (x > 0.001){
    
    return("")
  }
  
  else {
  
    p <- formatC(x, digits = 1, format = "e", flag = "#")
    
    ex <- p %>% str_extract("(?<=e).+") %>%
      str_remove_all("(?<=\\-)0+") %>%
      str_replace("-", "−")
    
    return(ex)
  }
}

get_expv <- Vectorize(get_exp)
```

```{r}
get_num <- function(x){

    if (x > 0.001){
    
      p <- formatC(x, digits = 2, format = "fg", flag = "#")
      
      return(p)
  }
  
  else {
  
    p <- formatC(x, digits = 1, format = "e", flag = "#")
    
    num <- p %>% str_extract(".+(?=e)")
    
    num <- str_c(num, "×10")
      
    return(num)
  }
}

get_numv <- Vectorize(get_num)
```

```{r}
df_otc_hm <- rkt_otc_ra  %>%
   mutate(tau_label = formatC(tau, digits = 2, format = "fg", flag = "#")) %>%
  mutate(tau_label = str_replace(tau_label, "-", "−")) %>%
  mutate(tau_label = paste0("'", tau_label, "'")) %>%
  
  mutate(p_num = get_numv(p_value),
         p_exp = get_expv(p_value)) %>%
  
  mutate(p_num = str_replace(p_num, "×", "%*%")) %>%
  
  mutate(p_num = case_when(p_exp == "" ~ paste0("{'", p_num,  "'}"),
                          .default = p_num)) %>%
  
  mutate(p_exp= case_when(p_exp != "" ~ paste0("^{'", p_exp,  "'}"),
                          .default = p_exp)) %>%
  mutate(p_label = paste0("italic(p) == ", p_num, p_exp)) 

df_otc_hm
```

```{r}
df_otc_hm <- df_otc_hm %>%
  mutate(SEX = factor(SEX, levels = c("Female", "Male", "All"))) %>%
  mutate(CAT = factor(CAT, levels = c("sum", "adj")))
```


```{r}
p2 <- df_otc_hm %>%
  mutate(X = "tau") %>%
#  mutate(p_label = paste0("(", p_label, ")")) %>%
  
   ggplot(aes(AGE, SEX , fill = tau))+
  geom_tile(linewidth = 0.3, colour = "black")+
  scale_fill_gradient2(low = "#74add1",
                      mid  = "white",
                      high = "#f46d43",
                      limits = c(-1, 1),
                      name = expression(tau))+
  geom_text(aes(
                label = tau_label),
            nudge_y = 0.2,
            size = 2.8, colour = "black",
            parse = TRUE)+
  
  geom_text(aes(
                label = p_label),
            nudge_y = -0.2,
            size = 2.8, colour = "black",
            parse = TRUE)+
  
  facet_grid2(cols = vars(X),
              rows = vars(CAT),
             scales = "free_y",
              space = "free_y",
             switch = "y",
             labeller = labeller(CAT = labeller_otc_ra)
               )+
  guides(fill = guide_colourbar(ticks.colour = "black",
                                ticks.linewidth = 0.2,
                                frame.colour = "black",
                                frame.linewidth = 0.2)) +
  labs(tag = "B",
       y = "Sex",
       x = "Age")+
    theme_classic()+
    theme(plot.tag = element_text(size = 12, colour = "black", face = "bold"),
          strip.placement = "outside",
          strip.background = element_blank(),
          
          strip.text.x = element_blank(),
          strip.text.y.left = element_markdown(size = 8, colour = "black", face = "bold",
                                               margin = margin(0, 0, 0, 0, "pt")),
          axis.title.x = element_text(size = 8, colour = "black", face = "bold"),
          axis.text.x = element_text(size = 8, colour = "black"),
          axis.title.y = element_blank(),
          axis.text.y = element_text(size = 8, colour = "black"),
          axis.line = element_blank(),
          axis.ticks = element_blank(),
          legend.title = element_text(size = 8, colour = "black", face = "bold"),
          legend.text = element_text(size = 8, colour = "black"),
          legend.key.height = unit(1.25, "lines"),
          legend.key.width = unit(0.75, "lines"),
          plot.margin = margin(0, 0, 0, 0, "mm"),
          legend.margin = margin(0, 0, 0, 0, "mm"),
          legend.box.margin = margin(0, 0, 0, 0, "mm"),
          legend.spacing = unit(3, "mm"),
          panel.spacing = unit(3, "mm"))

p2
```

```{r}
p12 <- p1 + free(p2) +
  plot_layout(heights  = c(4, 3))

ggsave("../figure/Fig3.pdf", p12,
       width = 175, height = 175,
       units = "mm")
```



```{r}
s2 <- df_otc_ra %>%
  mutate(YEAR = as.factor(YEAR)) %>%
  mutate(AGE = factor(AGE, levels = rev(levels_age_new))) %>%
  filter(CAT == "adj") %>%
  ggplot(aes(YEAR, AGE, fill = SUM))+
  geom_tile(linewidth = 0.3, colour = "black")+
  scale_fill_gradient(# low = "#74add1",
                      low  = "white",
                      high = "#E64626",
                      limits = c(0, 6000),
                      breaks = seq(0, 6000, 1000),
                      labels =  seq(0, 6000, 1000) %>% scales::comma(),
                      name = "Cost\n(JPY/person)")+
  geom_text(aes(label = round(SUM) %>% scales::comma()),
            size = 2.8, colour = "black")+
  facet_wrap(vars(SEX),
             ncol = 1,
             strip.position = "left")+
    guides(fill = guide_colourbar(ticks.colour = "black",
                                ticks.linewidth = 0.2,
                                frame.colour = "black",
                                frame.linewidth = 0.2)) +
  labs(# tag = "B",
       y = "Sex",
       x = "Year")+
  theme_classic()  +
  theme(
          strip.placement = "outside",
          strip.background = element_blank(),
          
          strip.text.x = element_blank(),
          strip.text.y.left = element_markdown(size = 8, colour = "black", face = "bold",
                                               margin = margin(0, 0, 0, 0, "mm")),
          axis.title.x = element_text(size = 8, colour = "black", face = "bold"),
          axis.text.x = element_text(size = 8, colour = "black"),
          axis.title.y = element_blank(),
          axis.text.y = element_text(size = 8, colour = "black"),
          axis.line = element_blank(),
          axis.ticks = element_blank(),
          legend.title = element_text(size = 8, colour = "black", face = "bold"),
          legend.text = element_text(size = 8, colour = "black"),
          legend.key.height = unit(1.5, "lines"),
          legend.key.width = unit(0.75, "lines"),
          plot.margin = margin(0, 0, 0, 0, "mm"),
          legend.margin = margin(0, 0, 0, 0, "mm"),
          legend.box.margin = margin(0, 0, 0, 0, "mm"),
          legend.spacing = unit(2, "mm"),
          panel.spacing = unit(2, "mm"))

s2 
```

```{r}
s2 <- s2 + plot_layout()

ggsave("../figure/FigS1.svg", s2,
        width = 175, height = 175,
       units = "mm")
```
